name: Spanking Runners
short_description: Spanking Runners (Samogonki) - arcade racing in a bright and unusual world. Fight on the tiny moons of the SamoG planet for precious Samogian water! After all, you need to save the world from the robots that have captured it, turning your friends into Electrozombies!
detailed_description:
Spanking Runners (Samogonki) - arcade racing in a bright and unusual world.

Choose a character and assemble your mechos from the strangest spells in the world! Fight on the tiny moons of the SamoG planet for precious Samogian water! After all, you need to save the world from the robots that have captured it, turning your friends into Electrozombies!

This game is a digital reissue of the 2001 game from the cult company K-D Lab. Features include:

- Several unique worlds with many racing tracks each. Race around each other on spherical planets!
- Win strange spell-weapons capable of summoning lightning from a clear sky, or crushing opponents with titanic spheres.
- Discover the funny and intriguing story of the planet SamoG and its surroundings.
- A unique turn-based mode for racing games - carefully plan each move!

supported_languages:
English*, Russian*, Italian*, Czech*
*languages with full audio support
